close_reason: Fixed by always setting explicit crate_root when src/lib.rs exists
description:
Building rustdeps-gen fails because base64 crate has ambiguous crate root.

**FIXED**: Always explicitly set crate_root when src/lib.rs exists.

**NEW ISSUE DISCOVERED**: Feature unification problem

synstructure requires syn with features: visit, extra-traits, derive, parsing, printing, clone-impls
But syn's default features only include: derive, parsing, printing, clone-impls, proc-macro

We only extract default features for each crate, not the features required by dependents.

This requires a more sophisticated solution:
1. Parse the dependency graph
2. Collect feature requirements from all dependents
3. Build each crate with the union of all required features

For now, the crate_root fix is done. Feature unification is a separate task.
title: Fix crate_root inference for crates with examples
